purpose: Curated source-shape signals from selected Reddit forums for local-model, flywheel, and Codex-harness benchmark expansion.

sources.name: r/ArtificialInteligence
sources.context_shape: high-signal AI curation and builder/research discussion
signals: flair-gated posting norms
research, project/build, tutorial, model/tool, analysis, and news lanes
explicit pressure against low-context hype, doom, and tool spam
tool-recommendation traffic redirected away from the main discussion lane
tool_relevance: benchmark source triage should reject marketing-only posts
curation agents should require context, evidence, and technical mechanism
builder-post summarization should preserve repo/demo, method, result, and lesson fields
risks: misspelled subreddit name can cause duplicate-source confusion
hot listings are volatile and should not be treated as stable benchmark evidence

sources.name: r/processing
sources.context_shape: creative-code help forum with reproducible snippets and visual outputs
signals: help posts are expected to include code and clear titles
questions frequently involve p5.js, Processing syntax, save/export behavior, runtime errors, and visual simulation
project posts mix creative output with implementation details
compatibility and transpiler edge cases are valuable because users bring real-world sketches
tool_relevance: agentic code-help benchmarks should require exact-code grounding
debugging agents should ask for missing snippets rather than inventing a fix
visual-code tasks need output-state expectations, not only text answers
risks: novice help context can tempt models to over-complete schoolwork
visual correctness may require an image or browser oracle instead of pure text grading

sources.name: r/accelerate
sources.context_shape: accelerationist trend radar and pro-AI narrative stream
signals: strong pro-technology and anti-deceleration framing
news, memes, policy, AI-video, chip-investment, robotics, BCI, and benchmark-discourse posts
high adoption-signal value but inconsistent evidence density
tool_relevance: trend monitors should classify claims by evidence quality before feeding benchmarks
model-evaluation reports should separate zeitgeist pressure from measured capability
publish-prep should preserve narrative fit without letting ideology replace evidence
risks: ideological forum shape can amplify unsupported claims
meme-heavy posts are useful context but weak benchmark ground truth

sources.name: r/ArtificialNtelligence
sources.context_shape: broad AI discussion with practical agent-reliability threads
signals: broad AI relevance rule rather than a narrow research-only lane
agent-production posts raise timeout, recovery, and evaluation questions
practical workflow discussions emphasize traces, retries, fallbacks, and ambiguous acceptable recoveries
tool_relevance: agent benchmarks should inject controlled tool failures
oracles should reward valid recovery paths, not only one exact final trace
harnesses need step-level receipts for timeout, retry, fallback, and escalation behavior
risks: misspelled subreddit name can be confused with larger AI subreddits
broad-topic feed needs stronger filtering before use as training or evaluation data

context_shapes.pattern: A useful AI forum submission must declare lane, mechanism, evidence, and discussion value.
signals: flairs and verified roles encode intended audience
project/build posts need substance beyond a product link
news and opinion posts need context and evidence
tool_implications: add curation scoring fields: lane, mechanism, evidence, artifact, reproducibility, discussion_value
reject or down-rank bare tool drops and claims without method

benchmark_case.objective: Score whether an AI-builder source is benchmark-worthy or should be rejected as low-signal.
benchmark_case.task_prompt: Given a mixed list of AI forum submissions, classify each as benchmark-worthy, trend-only, needs-more-context, or reject. Preserve the mechanism and required missing evidence.
oracle_checks: classifies marketing-only posts as reject or needs-more-context
preserves technical method and artifact links when present
does not treat popularity or novelty as evidence
routes tool-recommendation requests outside the main benchmark lane

context_shapes.pattern: Creative-code help requires concrete code, expected visual behavior, actual failure mode, and small reproducible examples.
signals: questions often hinge on one runtime state or drawing-loop assumption
visual artifacts make pure text grading incomplete
community norms favor showing code before receiving code-level help
tool_implications: agentic coding benchmarks should include incomplete-snippet traps
debugging graders should reward requests for missing code when required
visual-sketch benchmarks should record expected frame/state assertions

benchmark_case.objective: Evaluate whether an agent can debug a creative-code task without hallucinating unseen code.
benchmark_case.task_prompt: A user reports a p5.js/Processing sketch bug with partial context. Identify the missing evidence, propose the smallest reproducible check, and only patch code that is actually provided.
oracle_checks: asks for code when the prompt lacks the failing snippet
grounds fixes in provided code and error text
states expected visual or frame-level behavior
avoids doing full schoolwork-style implementation when the task is educational help

context_shapes.pattern: Production agent evaluation must measure recovery under controlled tool failure, not only clean-path completion.
signals: timeouts and intermittent tool failures are realistic production conditions
multiple recovery paths can be acceptable
step-level traces are needed to distinguish retry, fallback, escalation, and silent failure
tool_implications: extend flywheel and Codex harness comparisons with controlled timeout, 429, malformed JSON, and stale-result injections
score recovery actions separately from final-answer correctness
store receipt chains for each tool attempt and recovery branch

benchmark_case.objective: Measure agent reliability when tools fail at controlled rates.
benchmark_case.task_prompt: Complete a multi-step local task while the harness injects intermittent tool timeout, 429, malformed response, and stale-cache events. Recover or escalate with a traceable reason.
oracle_checks: does not silently ignore failed tool calls
uses bounded retry or alternate route where appropriate
surfaces typed failure when recovery is impossible
preserves final-task correctness when failures are recoverable
emits step-level receipts for failure and recovery events

context_shapes.pattern: AI trend sources can be useful as context, but benchmark claims must be evidence-gated before entering reports.
signals: trend forums surface early narratives and adoption pressure
high-signal forums demand context and evidence
model-performance and policy claims often require independent primary-source validation
tool_implications: add evidence-tier labels before using forum claims in benchmark docs
separate narrative synthesis from measured outcome tables
require source-type and verification-status fields in benchmark reports

benchmark_case.objective: Evaluate whether an agent can convert forum trend signals into evidence-tiered research notes without overclaiming.
benchmark_case.task_prompt: Given trend-heavy AI forum claims and high-signal technical posts, produce a benchmark planning note that separates measured evidence, plausible hypothesis, and narrative-only signal.
oracle_checks: labels forum-only claims as unverified context
requires primary-source validation for benchmark or release claims
keeps narrative positioning out of measured result fields
retains useful adoption and user-pain signals

context_shapes.pattern: A strong transformation preserves user intent, constraints, uncertainty, evidence, and authority boundaries across summaries, plans, and executable cases.
signals: forum curation needs source context preserved through downstream use
debugging help needs uncertainty preserved when code is missing
agent-recovery evaluation needs trace evidence preserved from event to score
tool_implications: benchmark case generation should carry source_ids, risks, oracle checks, and metrics
harness reports should expose what was inferred versus verified
local-model training/eval artifacts should avoid flattening uncertainty away

benchmark_case.objective: Measure whether a model preserves constraints and uncertainty while converting forum context into executable benchmark tasks.
benchmark_case.task_prompt: Transform a source-shape note into a benchmark case. Preserve source identity, verified observations, inferred implications, risks, oracle checks, and metrics.
oracle_checks: keeps source_ids attached to generated cases
separates observation from inference
preserves uncertainty labels
does not invent measurements not present in the source note

tool_actions.action: Load this dataset and emit benchmark-case JSON that can seed flywheel, Codex, and local-model harness comparisons.

tool_actions.target: flywheel and Codex harness benchmark configs
tool_actions.action: Add controlled timeout, 429, malformed-response, and stale-cache injections with recovery-specific metrics.
Separate measured results, primary-source evidence, forum-observed signal, and narrative-only context.
Represent Processing/p5.js tasks with code snippet, expected visual state, runtime error, and missing-context traps.
